templateMetadata.description: Measure forecast reliability by comparing committed forecast to actual closed won revenue
templateMetadata.useCase: Improve forecast accuracy, hold reps accountable, build exec confidence in forecasts
customizationPoints: Forecast category field (Commit, Best Case, Pipeline)
prerequisites: Collaborative Forecasting enabled OR Forecast_Category__c field
Historical opportunity data with forecast snapshots

reportMetadata.name: Forecast Accuracy - {Period}
reportMetadata.description: Forecast vs actual revenue with accuracy metrics

reportFilters.customizationNote: Include current and past quarters for comparison

groupingsAcross.customizationNote: Columns: Commit, Best Case, Pipeline, Closed Won

aggregates.name: AMOUNT
aggregates.description: Total forecast amount per category per month

customSummaryFormulas.name: Forecast_Accuracy_Percent
customSummaryFormulas.description: How close Commit forecast was to Actual

customSummaryFormulas.name: Forecast_Variance_Dollars
customSummaryFormulas.description: Dollar difference between forecast and actual
customSummaryFormulas.note: Positive = beat forecast, Negative = missed forecast

chart.note: Line chart showing forecast vs actual over time

forecastCategoryOptions.definition: Commit + deals with good chance to close

calculatedFieldsRequired.formula: IF(IsClosed && IsWon, 'Closed Won', IF(Probability >= 70, 'Commit', IF(Probability >= 50, 'Best Case', 'Pipeline')))
calculatedFieldsRequired.description: Auto-assign forecast category based on probability
calculatedFieldsRequired.note: Adjust probability thresholds to match your sales process

steps: 1. Enable Collaborative Forecasting OR create Forecast_Category__c field
2. If using custom field, create formula to auto-assign categories
3. Update CLOSE_DATE filter to include historical data
4. Deploy as Matrix report (rows = month, columns = forecast category)
5. Create custom summary formulas for accuracy calculations
6. Add line chart showing Commit, Best Case, and Actual over time
7. Review weekly or monthly with sales leadership

commonIssues: Sandbagging: Reps under-forecast to beat expectations (accuracy >110%)
Late-quarter surprises: Deals not in forecast suddenly close
actionItems: If accuracy <80%: Improve deal qualification, review probability criteria
If accuracy >110%: Address sandbagging, review incentive structure
Track individual rep accuracy to identify coaching needs
